stem: Inside the CPU is the Arithmetic Logic Unit (ALU).
model_answer: The ALU carries out arithmetic operations (such as addition and subtraction) and logical operations (such as AND, OR, NOT and comparisons between values).

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Describe the purpose of the ALU.

mark_points.text: performs logical operations (e.g. AND, OR, NOT, comparisons)
